eligible_applicant_type: Government agencies with a business support program
For-profit entities such as clean energy installers
Energy efficiency or home performance contractors
project_area: Clean energy sector support, including design, manufacture, installation, and maintenance of clean energy and decarbonization projects
demographic_requirements: Supports underrepresented businesses in the clean energy sector, with a focus on environmental justice communities and diversified workforce development
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations or partnerships with a Massachusetts office or staffing, including non-profits, academic institutions, government agencies, and for-profit entities. Applicants must propose projects that address barriers faced by underrepresented businesses, provide comprehensive wraparound services, and establish a robust cross-referral system between Hub and Spoke partnerships. Funding is not intended to benefit a single underrepresented business but to support a regional Hub and Spoke model.
